name: plastron-simple-file-explorer-example
description: Standalone file explorer demo — setupFileExplorer over segment-store + OPFS.

scripts.bundle: bun build index.html --target=browser --outdir dist --external pyodide --external quickjs-emscripten --external wabt --external node:fs/promises --external node:path
scripts.dev: bun run bundle && bun run serve
